## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .`, `ruff format --check .`, `mypy`, and `pytest -q` all pass
- [ ] Added or updated tests (fixtures stay small and synthetic — no third-party data)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (and `NOTICE` if behaviour diverges from upstream)
- [ ] The text dump format is unchanged, or the change is intentional and golden-tested
